title: doppler + gcp-sm: non-2xx response body discarded (same pattern as vault 4qd.6)
description: doppler get() and put(), and gcp-sm get() and put(), discard the HTTP response body on non-2xx errors, emitting only 'HTTP {status}'. Vault had the same issue (4qd.6) and was fixed. Doppler and gcp-sm have the same pattern. For gcp-sm, GCP error responses contain useful detail like 'Secret [name] not found' or 'Permission [X] denied'. For doppler, error bodies have similar API detail. Fix: read resp.text().await on error branches, append to the error message the same way vault was fixed.
